title: How to clenup table event_logs?
reason: A gives a valid cleanup method and correctly notes no built-in retention, while B fabricates a nonexistent retention_days config.

title: Asset dependencies across code locations
reason: A correctly describes the AssetSpec/external-dependency pattern matching the docs, while B fabricates a nonexistent @external_asset decorator with incorrect usage.

title: Code location instability - gRPC Error code: UNAVAILABLE
reason: Both miss the reference's key point that executing jobs don't talk to the user code server, but B uses more accurate real Dagster settings while A invents config keys.
